dimensions.label: Budget Discovery
dimensions.description: Did the rep uncover the prospect's budget range, funding source, or willingness to invest?

dimensions.label: Authority Mapping
dimensions.description: Did the rep identify the decision maker and understand the approval chain?

dimensions.label: Need Assessment
dimensions.description: Did the rep uncover a genuine, compelling business need that maps to their solution?

dimensions.label: Timeline Establishment
dimensions.description: Did the rep determine the prospect's urgency and expected implementation timeline?
